Hosting Org: AWS Cloud|Azure Cloud|On-premise Data Center|Regional Data Center
Purpose: Detailed description of what the application does, who uses it, and why it's important to the mission. Should be 100+ characters for high confidence scoring.
Notes: Any additional notes about the application
_comment_user_metrics: === USER METRICS (Quantitative - Preferred for accurate REACH scoring) ===

User Metrics._help_external: Number of users outside NOAA (industry, public, partners, state agencies)
User Metrics._help_regions: How many NOAA Fisheries regions use this? (1-6, or more for national)
User Metrics._help_scope: National=serves all regions, Regional=1-2 regions, Local=single office/program
User Metrics._help_fmc: Optional: List of Fishery Management Councils served (NPFMC, PFMC, etc)

_comment_mission_metrics: === MISSION METRICS (Quantitative - Preferred for accurate IMPACT scoring) ===

Mission Metrics._help_criticality: Tier 1=Mission Critical (24/7, immediate impact), Tier 2=High Impact (core workflows), Tier 3=Supporting
Mission Metrics._help_statutory: List applicable laws: MSA, ESA, MMPA, Treaty, NEPA, etc. Empty array [] if none
Mission Metrics._help_downtime: Estimated cost/impact of 1 hour of downtime in dollars. 0 if minimal/unknown
Mission Metrics._help_rto: Maximum acceptable downtime. Lower = more critical
Mission Metrics._help_rpo: Maximum acceptable data loss. How much can we lose?
Mission Metrics._help_mandates: Optional: Specific requirements like 'Annual Catch Limits', 'Bycatch Reporting'

_comment_resource_metrics: === RESOURCE METRICS (Quantitative - Preferred for accurate EFFORT scoring) ===

Resource Metrics._help_hosting: Total annual cloud/hosting costs in dollars
Resource Metrics._help_fte: Full-time equivalent staff dedicated to this app (0.5 = half-time, 2.0 = two people)
Resource Metrics._help_tickets: Number of support/help desk tickets per year
Resource Metrics._help_incidents: Number of production incidents (outages, bugs, security) per year
Resource Metrics._help_age: How many years old is the primary technology? (e.g., Rails 3 from 2011 = 15 years)
Resource Metrics._help_loc: Optional: Total lines of code (if known)
Resource Metrics._help_debt: Estimated hours of technical debt/refactoring needed
Resource Metrics._help_vulns: Optional: Number of known security vulnerabilities
Resource Metrics._help_update: Date of last significant feature/infrastructure update
